scores.correctness_notes: Correctly covers juju.integrate(), juju.wait() with jubilant.all_active(), and juju.cli() as fallback. Adds valid extra approaches (actions, exec) consistent with the gold standard's philosophy. Correctly explains that waiting for active status implicitly confirms data exchange.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all APIs used (juju.integrate, juju.wait, jubilant.all_active, juju.cli, juju.run, jubilant.all_blocked) follow consistent framework patterns; none are demonstrably fabricated
